ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the hospital */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the hospital */,
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Hospital Referral Region */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the hospital */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the hospital was established */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the hospital */,
  "emergency_department" TEXT /* Indicates whether the hospital has an emergency department (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_hrr_id FOREIGN KEY ("hrr_id") REFERENCES hospital_referral_regions ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_referral_regions" (
  "hrr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital referral region */,
  "hrr_description" TEXT /* Description of the hospital referral region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  "primary_care_physicians" INTEGER /* Number of primary care physicians in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hrr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_related_groups" (
  "drg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the DRG */,
  "drg_code" TEXT /* Code of the DRG */,
  "drg_description" TEXT /* Description of the DRG */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code associated with the DRG */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discharge_data" (
  "discharge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discharge record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "drg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DRG */,
  "total_discharges" INTEGER /* Total number of discharges for the DRG */,
  "average_covered_charges" REAL /* Average covered charges for the DRG */,
  "average_total_payments" REAL /* Average total payments for the DRG */,
  "average_medicare_payments" REAL /* Average Medicare payments for the DRG */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the discharge data */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "length_of_stay" INTEGER /* Length of stay in days */,
  "readmission_flag" TEXT /* Indicates whether the patient was readmitted within 30 days (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discharge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discharge_data_drg_id FOREIGN KEY ("drg_id") REFERENCES diagnosis_related_groups ("drg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discharge_data_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "discharge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discharge record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_discharge_id FOREIGN KEY ("discharge_id") REFERENCES discharge_data ("discharge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the financial data */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the year */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the year */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the year */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income for the year */,
  "non_operating_income" REAL /* Non-operating income for the year */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the hospital */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "drg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DRG */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the outcome data */,
  "readmission_rate" REAL /* Readmission rate for the DRG */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for the DRG */,
  "satisfaction_score" REAL /* Patient satisfaction score for the DRG */,
  "readmission_days" INTEGER /* Number of days to readmission */,
  "complication_rate" REAL /* Rate of complications for the DRG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_outcomes_drg_id FOREIGN KEY ("drg_id") REFERENCES diagnosis_related_groups ("drg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_outcomes_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the quality metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., infection rate, readmission rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the quality metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "metric_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the metric (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance report (e.g., regulatory, safety) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the compliance report */,
  "filed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who filed the report */,
  "filed_by_role" TEXT /* Role of the person who filed the report (e.g., administrator, manager) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_demographics" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., Medicare, Medicaid, Private) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_demographics_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient condition */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "drg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DRG */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment (e.g., 30 days) */,
  "primary_diagnosis" TEXT /* Primary diagnosis for the condition */,
  "secondary_diagnosis" TEXT /* Secondary diagnosis (if any) */,
  "complications" TEXT /* Complications related to the condition */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., improved, no change, worsened) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_conditions_drg_id FOREIGN KEY ("drg_id") REFERENCES diagnosis_related_groups ("drg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_demographics ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "number_of_patients" INTEGER /* Number of patients enrolled in the trial */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "sponsoring_entity" TEXT /* Name of the sponsoring entity */,
  "clinical_trial_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the clinical trial (if different from `trial_id`) */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* Location(s) where the trial is conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)
